Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestTypenvSpecialization

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestTypenvSpecialization
public class TestTypenvSpecialization extends AbstractTests
Unit tests for specialization of type environments. For each test, we specify a source type environment, then a specialization (type substitution and identifier substitution), followed by the expected type environment after specialization.

    ALL_VERSION_FACTORIES, BOOL_TYPE, EXT_CONS, EXT_HEAD, EXT_LIST, EXT_NIL, EXT_TAIL, ff, ffV1, INT_TYPE, LIST_DT, LIST_FAC, LIST_INT_TYPE, NO_BIDS, NO_EXPRS, NO_IDS, NO_PREDS, POW_LIST_INT_TYPE

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private static void
    assertSpecialization(String srcTypenvImage, String specImage, String expectedImage)
     
    private static void
    assertSpecialization(String srcTypenvImage, ISpecialization spe, String expectedImage)
     
    private static void
    assertSpecialization(ITypeEnvironment typenv, ISpecialization spe, String expectedImage)
     
    private static void
    assertTypeSpecialization(String srcTypenvImage, String specImage, String expectedImage)
     
    void
    dstIdentBlocksTypenv()
    Ensures that specializing a type environment containing an identifier which has no substitution raises an exception if the identifier is already used with a different type in the right-hand side of some substitution.
    void
    dstTypeBlocksTypenv()
    Ensures that specializing a type environment containing a given type which has no substitution raises an exception if the name of the given type is already used with a different type in the right-hand side of some substitution.
    void
    identBlocksTypenvSpecialization()
    Ensures that specializing a type environment containing an identifier which has no substitution cannot conflict with an existing substitution.
    void
    identDoesNotBlockTypenvSpecialization()
    Ensures that specializing a type environment containing an identifier which gets substituted cannot conflict with an existing substitution.
    void
    testEmptySpecialization()
    Ensures that an empty specialization does not change a type environment.
    void
    testGivenDisappears()
    Ensures that a given type which is specialized disappears from the type environment.
    void
    testGivenReappears()
    Ensures that a given type which is specialized reappears if it occurs in the right-hand side of some type substitutions.
    void
    testGivenReappearsNot()
    Ensures that a given type which is specialized does not reappear if it occurs in the right-hand side of some type substitutions which is never applied.
    void
    testGivenUnchanged()
    Ensures that a given type which is not specialized is retained in the type environment.
    void
    testIdentNotSubstituted()
    Ensures that an identifier which is not substituted has its type changed, if needed.
    void
    testIdentSubstituted()
    Ensures that an identifier can be substituted.
    void
    testIdentSubstitutedNoTypeChange()
    Ensures that an identifier can be substituted even when its type does not change.
    void
    testSwapBoth()
    Ensures that types and identifiers can be swapped at the same time.
    void
    testSwapIdents()
    Ensures that identifiers can be swapped.
    void
    testSwapTypes()
    Ensures that types can be swapped.
    void
    typeBlocksTypenvSpecialization()
    Ensures that specializing a type environment containing a given type which has no substitution cannot conflict with an existing substitution.
    void
    typeDoesNotBlockTypenvSpecialization()
    Ensures that specializing a type environment containing a given type which gets substituted does not conflict with a substituted identifier.
    void
    typenvBlocksDstIdent()
    Ensures that specializing a type environment prevents adding later an identifier substitution using an identifier in its replacement which conflicts with an identifier of the specialized type environment.
    void
    typenvBlocksDstType()
    Ensures that specializing a type environment prevents adding later a type substitution using a given type in its replacement which conflicts with an identifier of the specialized type environment.
    void
    typenvBlocksIdent()
    Ensures that specializing a type environment prevents adding later a substitution on an identifier occurring in the environment.
    void
    typenvBlocksIdentDifferentType()
    Ensures that specializing a type environment prevents adding later a substitution on an identifier with the same name as one occurring in the environment but with a different type.
    void
    typenvBlocksType()
    Ensures that specializing a type environment prevents adding later a substitution on a type occurring in the environment.

    assertFailure, assertSuccess, CPROD, parseAssignment, parseAssignment, parseAssignment, parseExpression, parseExpression, parseExpression, parsePredicate, parsePredicate, parsePredicate, parseType, parseType, POW, REL, typeCheck, typeCheck

  • Method Details

    • testEmptySpecialization

      public void testEmptySpecialization()
      Ensures that an empty specialization does not change a type environment.

    • testGivenDisappears

      public void testGivenDisappears()
      Ensures that a given type which is specialized disappears from the type environment.

    • testGivenReappears

      public void testGivenReappears()
      Ensures that a given type which is specialized reappears if it occurs in the right-hand side of some type substitutions.

    • testGivenReappearsNot

      public void testGivenReappearsNot()
      Ensures that a given type which is specialized does not reappear if it occurs in the right-hand side of some type substitutions which is never applied.

    • testGivenUnchanged

      public void testGivenUnchanged()
      Ensures that a given type which is not specialized is retained in the type environment.

    • testIdentNotSubstituted

      public void testIdentNotSubstituted()
      Ensures that an identifier which is not substituted has its type changed, if needed.

    • testIdentSubstitutedNoTypeChange

      public void testIdentSubstitutedNoTypeChange()
      Ensures that an identifier can be substituted even when its type does not change.

    • testIdentSubstituted

      public void testIdentSubstituted()
      Ensures that an identifier can be substituted.

    • testSwapTypes

      public void testSwapTypes()
      Ensures that types can be swapped.

    • testSwapIdents

      public void testSwapIdents()
      Ensures that identifiers can be swapped.

    • testSwapBoth

      public void testSwapBoth()
      Ensures that types and identifiers can be swapped at the same time.

    • typenvBlocksType

      public void typenvBlocksType()
      Ensures that specializing a type environment prevents adding later a substitution on a type occurring in the environment.

    • typenvBlocksIdent

      public void typenvBlocksIdent()
      Ensures that specializing a type environment prevents adding later a substitution on an identifier occurring in the environment.

    • typenvBlocksIdentDifferentType

      public void typenvBlocksIdentDifferentType()
      Ensures that specializing a type environment prevents adding later a substitution on an identifier with the same name as one occurring in the environment but with a different type.

    • typeBlocksTypenvSpecialization

      public void typeBlocksTypenvSpecialization()
      Ensures that specializing a type environment containing a given type which has no substitution cannot conflict with an existing substitution.

    • identBlocksTypenvSpecialization

      public void identBlocksTypenvSpecialization()
      Ensures that specializing a type environment containing an identifier which has no substitution cannot conflict with an existing substitution.

    • typeDoesNotBlockTypenvSpecialization

      public void typeDoesNotBlockTypenvSpecialization()
      Ensures that specializing a type environment containing a given type which gets substituted does not conflict with a substituted identifier.

    • identDoesNotBlockTypenvSpecialization

      public void identDoesNotBlockTypenvSpecialization()
      Ensures that specializing a type environment containing an identifier which gets substituted cannot conflict with an existing substitution.

    • typenvBlocksDstType

      public void typenvBlocksDstType()
      Ensures that specializing a type environment prevents adding later a type substitution using a given type in its replacement which conflicts with an identifier of the specialized type environment.

    • typenvBlocksDstIdent

      public void typenvBlocksDstIdent()
      Ensures that specializing a type environment prevents adding later an identifier substitution using an identifier in its replacement which conflicts with an identifier of the specialized type environment.

    • dstTypeBlocksTypenv

      public void dstTypeBlocksTypenv()
      Ensures that specializing a type environment containing a given type which has no substitution raises an exception if the name of the given type is already used with a different type in the right-hand side of some substitution.

    • dstIdentBlocksTypenv

      public void dstIdentBlocksTypenv()
      Ensures that specializing a type environment containing an identifier which has no substitution raises an exception if the identifier is already used with a different type in the right-hand side of some substitution.

      private static void assertSpecialization(String srcTypenvImage, String specImage, String expectedImage)

    • assertTypeSpecialization

    • assertSpecialization

      private static void assertSpecialization(String srcTypenvImage, ISpecialization spe, String expectedImage)

    • assertSpecialization

      private static void assertSpecialization(ITypeEnvironment typenv, ISpecialization spe, String expectedImage)
